case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. IOPU LUTU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY YOLANDA ARENAS--CCSF/SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUTU, IOPU $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
